evals.name: write-mode-startup-pivot
evals.prompt: 我们的创业项目做了三个月，方向改了四次，现在又要重新开始。给我写首诗定个调。
evals.expected_output: A classical-style Chinese poem (五言/七言, 4-8 lines) that captures the essence of repeated pivots, with interpretation connecting to the project situation

evals.name: read-mode-growth-plateau
evals.prompt: 我们的产品增长到了一个平台期，用户数卡在10万上不去。有什么古诗词能解读一下这个情况吗？
evals.expected_output: A classical Chinese poem that mirrors the plateau situation, with interpretation and actionable insights

evals.name: interpret-mode-team-motto
evals.prompt: 团队给我的项目寄语是'长风破浪会有时，直挂云帆济沧海'，帮我品品这首诗对我们团队意味着什么
evals.expected_output: Deep interpretation of the poem's meaning, connected to team context, with practical action insights
